arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues Rodri injury update after Man City's thriller with Arsenal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is unsure of the severity of the injury that Rodri suffered in Manchester City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Liverpool won something, Arsenal didn't' - Bernardo Silva launches extraordinary attack on rivals
arts.sum: Bernardo Silva has criticised Arsenal's record and their style of play in an extraordinary rant after Manchester City were held to a 2-2 draw in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland incident that triggered furious bust-up between Man City and Arsenal stars
arts.sum: Manchester City denied title rivals Arsenal on Sunday afternoon through John Stones' late equaliser and striker Erling Haaland caused a bit of mischief in his side's celebrations following the goal
